name: Netflix
reliabilityNotes: Netflix aggressively blocks VPN connections and continuously updates its blacklist of known VPN IP ranges. Only premium VPNs with dedicated obfuscated servers tend to work, and success varies by region.
troubleshootingTips: Use a premium VPN with dedicated streaming/obfuscated servers
Connect to a server in your target region before opening Netflix
Clear browser cache and cookies before each session
Try multiple server locations within the same region if one is blocked
Contact your VPN provider's support for recommended servers
Consider using a residential IP or dedicated IP service
